# Copilot Instructions

All repository conventions live in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md). Read it before making changes.

Path-scoped detail:

- [`instructions/main.instructions.md`](instructions/main.instructions.md) — repo-wide rules.
- [`instructions/a11y.instructions.md`](instructions/a11y.instructions.md) — accessibility rules for UI files.
- [`agents/accessibility-ally.agent.md`](agents/accessibility-ally.agent.md) — WCAG 2.2 AA auditor.
- [`prompts/changelog.prompt.md`](prompts/changelog.prompt.md) — release entry generator.
